summary: Homepage performance dropped further to 71 (LCP 6.5 s), extending a persistent multi-audit regression well below the 85 threshold; /about remains an empty placeholder with SEO still at 83. All project pages are visually intact, though /projects and /projects/note-structurer dipped slightly on performance (still within or near threshold).

pages.visual_fingerprint: Full-page portfolio homepage with teal-accented hero ('App' heading, 'Send me a message' CTA), four content sections (pillars, case studies, skills, contact form), and a dark contact footer — all sections visible and correctly laid out on both desktop and mobile.

visual_findings: Page still contains only the placeholder text 'This is an about page' on a near-blank dark canvas — no real content, nav, or footer present on either desktop or mobile.
pages.visual_fingerprint: Nearly blank dark page with only the stub text 'This is an about page' in the upper-left corner and no other UI elements visible on desktop or mobile.

Fully styled projects index page with 'My Projects' heading, five project cards (Clinical Note Structurer, Screenshot → PrimeVue, Lease Diff Explainer, Paperwork → Calendar, Dependency Upgrade Planner) in a 2-column desktop grid with the fifth card left-aligned, and a dark contact footer visible on both desktop and mobile.

Clinical Note Structurer detail page with breadcrumb nav, 'Evals: 10/10 passing' badge, two-column visit note / structured result interactive demo, amber disclaimer banner, expandable JSON and HIPAA notes accordions, and a dark contact footer — correctly rendered on both desktop and mobile.

Screenshot → PrimeVue detail page with breadcrumb nav, 'Evals: 5/5 passing' badge, dashed-border image drop zone, three sample thumbnail cards (Login form, Analytics dashboard, Pricing page), a placeholder result panel, expandable accordions, and a dark contact footer — correctly rendered on both desktop and mobile.

score_deltas: / performance 75 → 71 (-4 pts — still persistently below 85, now at lowest recorded point)
/ lcp_ms 6232 → 6540 (+308 ms — worsening, critically slow above 6 s)
/projects performance 93 → 83 (-10 pts — material drop, now below 85)

top_fix: Fix the homepage LCP (currently 6.5 s, performance score 71, now at its worst recorded point across many consecutive audits): preload the hero image with `<link rel="preload" as="image">`, serve it in WebP/AVIF at mobile-appropriate dimensions, and defer render-blocking resources above the fold — this remains the single highest-impact unresolved issue on the site.
issue_title: Homepage performance 71 (LCP 6.5 s) persistent & worsening regression; /projects and /note-structurer dropped below 85; /about still empty placeholder
issue_body:
## Homepage performance is worsening — persistent, unresolved

The homepage (`/`) scored **71** on today's mobile Lighthouse audit (2026-07-18), with LCP at **6,540 ms** — the lowest performance score and highest LCP recorded across all recent audits. No structural fix has been applied.

### Current metrics (mobile) — `/`
| Metric | Value | vs. Previous |
|---|---|---|
| Performance | 71 | -4 pts (persistent regression, now at worst recorded point) |
| LCP | 6,540 ms | +308 ms (worsening) |
| CLS | 0.015 | stable |
| TBT | 171 ms | +48 ms (within jitter) |

### Suggested fix
Preload the LCP hero image with `<link rel="preload" as="image">`, serve it in WebP/AVIF sized for mobile viewports, and defer render-blocking stylesheets/scripts above the fold.

---

## New: `/projects` and `/projects/note-structurer` both dropped below 85

Both pages fell 10 points each this audit. This mirrors the /projects regression seen two audits ago, and may be transient load-related jitter, but the magnitude warrants watching.

| Page | Previous | Current | Delta |
|---|---|---|---|
| /projects | 93 | 83 | -10 pts |
| /projects/note-structurer | 91 | 81 | -10 pts |

Both pages appear visually intact. If scores do not recover in tomorrow's audit, investigate shared bundle or serverless cold-start impact on LCP.

---

## Still open — `/about` placeholder

`/about` remains an empty placeholder (stub text "This is an about page" only — no nav, no footer, no real content). SEO score is **83**, below the 85 threshold. Unchanged across multiple consecutive audits.

### Suggested fix
Build out the About page with real content, navigation, and footer. This will also resolve the below-threshold SEO score.
